title: Meson
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''meson''' was a subatomic particle that was discharged as waste from [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptors]].

They were likely involved with [[Meson taloscope/Legends|meson taloscopes]].<ref name="EP1VD">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-05-XX -->''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''
*<!-- 2002-04-23 -->''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Incredible Cross-Sections]]''
